bugs.title: State machine does not allow active->planning (pause trip) despite CLAUDE.md documenting it
bugs.description: The CLAUDE.md state diagram shows 'Traveling -> Planning: Pause trip' as a valid transition. However, the code in internal/trip/service.go isValidStatusTransition() only allows active->completed. Attempting active->planning returns 'failed_precondition: invalid trip status transition: active -> planning'. Either the code or the documentation is wrong.
bugs.expected: active->planning should be allowed (per CLAUDE.md state diagram) OR the documentation should be updated to remove the pause transition
bugs.api_command: UpdateTrip with status TRIP_STATUS_PLANNING on an ACTIVE trip

bugs.title: DeleteBooking silently succeeds for non-existent booking ID (idempotent)
bugs.description: DeleteBooking with a valid UUID format that does not correspond to any booking returns an empty success response {} instead of NOT_FOUND. While idempotent deletes are a valid design choice, this means the client cannot distinguish between 'booking was deleted' and 'booking never existed'. This is acceptable behavior but noted for awareness.
bugs.expected: Either NOT_FOUND or silent success (both are defensible)

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: This is a structural/adversarial test persona, not a user experience test. No AI interactions were evaluated. All 10 specified test cases passed: validation interceptor correctly rejects malformed IDs, empty/oversized strings; status machine enforces transitions; empty collections return success. The API surface is well-hardened against edge cases.
